report.title: Big British Garden Survey Gardens list
report.description: A list of gardens registered for the Big British Garden Survey.
report.query: SELECT #columns# FROM locations l LEFT JOIN locations_websites lw on lw.location_id=l.id AND lw.deleted=false LEFT JOIN cache_termlists_terms ttype ON ttype.id=l.location_type_id LEFT JOIN location_attribute_values lav ON lav.location_id=l.id AND lav.location_attribute_id=429 and lav.deleted=false JOIN users_websites accesscheck on accesscheck.website_id=lw.website_id AND accesscheck.user_id=#auth_user_id# AND accesscheck.site_role_id<3 LEFT JOIN location_attribute_values vchk on vchk.location_id=l.id AND vchk.location_attribute_id=433 and vchk.deleted=false WHERE #website_filter# AND l.deleted=false AND l.location_type_id=24469

column.name: vchk
column.sql: CASE WHEN vchk.int_value IS NULL OR vchk.int_value=24627 THEN 'unchecked' WHEN vchk.int_value=24628 THEN 'checked' WHEN vchk.int_value=24629 THEN 'invalid' ELSE '-' END
